title: Authority Cross-References
description: An array of cross-references to external authority files. Each item identifies a single authority record (Wikidata QID, Pleiades PID, VIAF ID, GeoNames ID, OpenITI URI, TGN ID, LCNAF ID, ISNI). Phase 0 (v0.1.0) actively reconciles only Wikidata and Pleiades; the remaining authorities are forward-declared in the enum so that pipelines for Phase 0.2+ can extend the same schema without breaking existing records.

authority.description: Authority identifier. Phase 0: 'wikidata' and 'pleiades' are reconciled actively. Phase 0.2: 'viaf' (person), 'openiti' (source). Phase 1: 'geonames'. Phase 2+: 'tgn', 'lcnaf', 'isni', 'gnd', 'bnf'.

id.description: Authority-specific identifier as a string. Format constraints depend on 'authority'; cross-validated by pipelines/reconcilers/utils/id_format.py. Examples: wikidata 'Q5773'; pleiades '658381'; viaf '12345678'; geonames '170063'; openiti '0429Yaqut.MucamBuldan'.

confidence.description: Reconciliation confidence in [0, 1]. 1.0 = manually verified gold standard; >=0.85 = high-confidence auto-match; 0.70-0.85 = medium-confidence (auto-accepted in Phase 0 only if no manual review queue triggered); <0.70 = low-confidence (Phase 0 dispatches to manual review).

method.description: Reconciliation method. 'manual' = human verified. 'openrefine_v3' = Wikidata Reconciliation API + property hints. 'coordinate_distance' = matched to Pleiades by lat/lon proximity (≤10 km). 'label_fuzzy' = Levenshtein > 0.85. 'imported_from_source' = the cross-reference came from a source dataset (Le Strange has Yâkût refs already).

reviewed.description: True iff a human has confirmed this match. Records with reviewed=true and confidence<1.0 are unusual and indicate a reviewer accepted a match below ideal confidence.

reviewed_at.description: ISO 8601 datetime of the manual review (when reviewed=true).

reviewed_by.description: URI of the reviewer; preferably an ORCID ('https://orcid.org/0000-0002-7747-6854').

note.description: Editorial note: disambiguation rationale, alternative candidates considered, why this match was preferred.

id.description: OpenITI URI in the canonical form '<deathYearAH>AuthorShortname.WorkShortname' (e.g., '0429Yaqut.MucamBuldan').
ISNI in the canonical 16-digit grouped form '0000 0001 2103 2683'.

$comment: Phase 0 pipeline actively populates only authority='wikidata' and authority='pleiades'. Other authority values are accepted by the schema but result in no automated reconciliation work in v0.1.0.
